input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
fname = 'articles/2026/02/21/articles.jsonl'
kws = ['iran', 'nuclear', 'strike', 'trump', 'tariff', 'india pakistan', 'ceasefire', 't20 super eight', 'super eight', 'champions league', 'manchester united', 'amorim', 'carrick', 'chelsea', 'university immigration', 'barcelona', 'hamstring', 'gorton', 'prediction market', 'newcastle']
with open(fname) as f:
    for line in f:
        art = json.loads(line)
        title = (art.get('title','') or '').lower()
        for kw in kws:
            if kw in title:
                print(f'[{kw}] {(art.get(\"title\",\"\") or \"\")[:120]}')
                break
" 2>/dev/null | head -40
